facts.explanation: 啊 (a) — interjection of surprise or exclamation; also used as a sentence-final softener. Example: 啊，真美！(a, zhēn měi!) — 'Ah, how beautiful!'
让 (ràng) — to yield. Also: to permit, to let sb do sth, to have sb do sth, to make sb (feel sad etc)
但 (dàn) — but; yet; however; still. Also: merely; only; just
自己 (zì jǐ) — oneself. Also: one's own
得 (dé) — to obtain. Also: to get, to gain, to catch (a disease), proper
可以 (kě yǐ) — can. Also: may, possible, able to, not bad
为 (wéi) — for; as. Also: to take sth as, to act as, to serve as, to behave as
已经 (yǐ jīng) — already.
如果 (rú guǒ) — if. Also: in case, in the event that
因为 (yīn wèi) — because. Also: owing to, on account of
又 (yòu) — (once) again. Also: also, both... and..., and yet, (used for emphasis) anyway
只 (zhǐ) — only. Also: merely, just, but
问题 (wèn tí) — question. Also: problem, issue, topic
它 (tā) — it.
但是 (dàn shì) — but; however.
该 (gāi) — should. Also: ought to, probably, must be, to deserve
更 (gēng) — even more. Also: to experience, one of the five two-hour periods into which the night was formerly divided, watch (e.g. of a sentry or guard)
可能 (kě néng) — might (happen). Also: possible, probable, possibility, probability
开始 (kāi shǐ) — to begin. Also: beginning, to start, initial
才 (cái) — ability; talent. Also: sb of a certain type, a capable individual, then and only then, just now
像 (xiàng) — to resemble. Also: to be like, to look as if, such as, appearance
所以 (suǒ yǐ) — therefore. Also: as a result, so, the reason why
那么 (nà me) — like that. Also: in that way, or so, so, so very much
这么 (zhè me) — so much. Also: this much, how much?, this way, like this
认为 (rèn wéi) — to believe; to think.
应该 (yīng gāi) — ought to. Also: should, must
带 (dài) — band. Also: belt, girdle, ribbon, tire
位 (wèi) — position. Also: location, place, seat, classifier for people (honorific)
希望 (xī wàng) — to hope. Also: a hope; a wish
大家 (dà jiā) — everyone. Also: influential family, great expert
发现 (fā xiàn) — to notice. Also: to discover; to find; to detect, a discovery
一定 (yī dìng) — surely. Also: certainly, necessarily, fixed, a certain (extent etc)
生活 (shēng huó) — to live. Also: life, livelihood
一直 (yī zhí) — straight (in a straight line). Also: continuously; always; all the way through
不过 (bù guò) — only. Also: merely, no more than, but, however
公司 (gōng sī) — company; firm.
不要 (bù yào) — don't!. Also: must not
第一 (dì yī) — first. Also: number one, primary
名 (míng) — name. Also: noun (part of speech), place (e.g. among winners), famous, classifier for people
所有 (suǒ yǒu) — all. Also: to have; to possess; to own
而且 (ér qiě) — (not only ...) but also. Also: moreover, in addition, furthermore
长 (cháng) — length. Also: long, forever, always, constantly
成为 (chéng wéi) — to become; to turn into.
其他 (qí tā) — other. Also: (sth or sb) else, the rest
事情 (shì qing) — affair; matter; thing.
感觉 (gǎn jué) — feeling; impression. Also: to feel; to perceive
然后 (rán hòu) — then; after that.
条 (tiáo) — strip. Also: item, article, clause (of law or treaty), classifier for long thin things (ribbon, river, road, trousers etc)
场 (cháng) — threshing floor. Also: classifier for events and happenings: spell, episode, bout
件 (jiàn) — item. Also: component, classifier for events, things, clothes etc
进行 (jìn xíng) — to advance. Also: to conduct, underway, in progress, to do

facts.quizQuestion: What does "为什么" (wèi shén me) mean?
facts.explanation: 为什么 (wèi shén me) — why?. Also: for what reason?
或 (huò) — maybe. Also: perhaps, might, possibly, or
出现 (chū xiàn) — to appear. Also: to arise, to emerge, to show up
头 (tóu) — head. Also: hair style, the top, end, beginning or end
每 (měi) — each. Also: every
见到 (jiàn dào) — to see.
通过 (tōng guò) — to pass through. Also: to adopt (a resolution); to pass (legislation), to pass (a test), by means of; through; via
周 (Zhōu) — Zhou Dynasty (1046-256 BC). Also: Zhou Dynasty (1046-256 BC)
过去 (guò qù) — the past. Also: former, previous, to go over, to pass by
参加 (cān jiā) — to participate. Also: to take part, to join
安全 (ān quán) — safe; secure. Also: safety; security
结果 (jiē guǒ) — to bear fruit.
或者 (huò zhě) — or. Also: possibly; maybe; perhaps
不错 (bù cuò) — correct. Also: right, not bad, pretty good
机会 (jī huì) — opportunity. Also: chance, occasion
完全 (wán quán) — complete; whole. Also: totally; entirely
完 (wán) — to finish. Also: to be over, whole, complete, entire
发 (fā) — to send out. Also: to show (one's feeling), to issue, to develop, to make a bundle of money
计划 (jì huà) — plan. Also: project, program, to plan, to map out
可是 (kě shì) — but; however. Also: (used for emphasis) indeed
以后 (yǐ hòu) — after. Also: later, afterwards, following, later on
要求 (yāo qiú) — to request. Also: to require, requirement, to stake a claim, to ask
玩 (wán) — to play. Also: to have fun, to trifle with, toy, sth used for amusement
信 (xìn) — letter. Also: mail, to trust, to believe, to profess faith in
队 (duì) — squadron. Also: team, group
接 (jiē) — to receive. Also: to answer (the phone), to meet or welcome sb, to connect, to catch
相信 (xiāng xìn) — to be convinced (that sth is true).
刚 (gāng) — hard. Also: firm, strong, just, barely
虽然 (suī rán) — although.
原因 (yuán yīn) — cause. Also: origin, root cause, reason
只要 (zhǐ yào) — if only. Also: so long as
不同 (bù tóng) — different. Also: distinct, not the same, not alike
进入 (jìn rù) — to enter. Also: to join, to go into
有人 (yǒu rén) — someone. Also: people, anyone, there is someone there, occupied (as in restroom)
接受 (jiē shòu) — to accept. Also: to receive
其中 (qí zhōng) — among. Also: in, included among these
人们 (rén men) — people.
道 (dào) — road. Also: path, principle, truth, morality
拉 (lā) — to pull. Also: to play (a bowed instrument), to drag, to draw, to chat
完成 (wán chéng) — to complete.
求 (qiú) — to seek. Also: to look for, to request, to demand, to beseech
帮助 (bāng zhù) — assistance; aid. Also: to help; to assist
变 (biàn) — to change. Also: to become different, to transform, to vary, rebellion
加 (Jiā) — to add. Also: surname Jia
当时 (dāng shí) — then. Also: at that time, while
努力 (nǔ lì) — to make an effort. Also: hard-working; conscientious
部分 (bù fen) — part. Also: share, section, piece
以前 (yǐ qián) — before. Also: formerly, previous, ago
办法 (bàn fǎ) — means. Also: method, way (of doing sth)
特别 (tè bié) — unusual; special. Also: very; especially; particularly, expressly; for a specific purpose, (often followed by 是) in particular
真正 (zhēn zhèng) — genuine; real; true. Also: really; indeed
掉 (diào) — to fall. Also: to drop, to lag behind, to lose, to go missing
改变 (gǎi biàn) — to change. Also: to alter, to transform
讲 (jiǎng) — to speak. Also: to explain, to negotiate, to emphasize, to be particular about
离开 (lí kāi) — to depart; to leave.
万 (mò) — used in 俟.
生 (shēng) — to be born. Also: to give birth, life, to grow, raw
片 (piān) — disk. Also: sheet
同时 (tóng shí) — at the same time. Also: simultaneously
以为 (yǐ wéi) — to think (i.e. to take it to be true that ...).
越 (Yuè) — more and more. Also: abbr. for Vietnam 越南
方法 (fāng fǎ) — method. Also: way, means
直接 (zhí jiē) — direct (opposite: indirect 间接). Also: immediate, straightforward
卖 (mài) — to sell. Also: to betray, to spare no effort, to show off or flaunt
选 (xuǎn) — to choose. Also: to pick, to select, to elect
影响 (yǐng xiǎng) — influence. Also: effect, to influence, to affect (usually adversely), to disturb
永远 (yǒng yuǎn) — forever. Also: eternal
方面 (fāng miàn) — respect. Also: aspect, field, side
也许 (yě xǔ) — perhaps. Also: maybe
面 (miàn) — face. Also: side, surface, aspect, top
活动 (huó dòng) — to exercise. Also: to move about, to operate, to use connections (personal influence), loose
份 (fèn) — portion; share. Also: variant of 分
信息 (xìn xī) — information. Also: news, message
最近 (zuì jìn) — recently. Also: soon, nearest
换 (huàn) — to exchange. Also: to change (clothes etc), to substitute, to switch, to convert (currency)
靠 (kào) — to lean on. Also: to stand by the side of, to come near to, to depend on, to trust
脸 (liǎn) — face.
快乐 (kuài lè) — happy; joyful.
使用 (shǐ yòng) — to use. Also: to employ, to apply, to make use of
检查 (jiǎn chá) — inspection. Also: to examine, to inspect
中心 (zhōng xīn) — center. Also: heart, core
行动 (xíng dòng) — operation. Also: action, to move about, mobile
开心 (kāi xīn) — to feel happy. Also: to rejoice, to have a great time, to make fun of sb
懂 (dǒng) — to understand. Also: to comprehend
卡 (kǎ) — to stop. Also: to block, (computing) (coll.) slow, (loanword) card, truck (from "car")
带来 (dài lái) — to bring. Also: (fig.) to bring about; to produce
办 (bàn) — to do. Also: to manage, to handle, to go about, to run
过来 (guò lái) — to come over. Also: to manage, to handle, to be able to take care of
辆 (liàng) — classifier for vehicles.
药 (yào) — medicine; drug. Also: variant of 药
家庭 (jiā tíng) — family. Also: household
交 (jiāo) — to hand over. Also: to deliver, to pay (money), to turn over, to make friends
套 (tào) — to cover. Also: to encase, cover, sheath, to overlap
全部 (quán bù) — whole; all.
刚刚 (gāng gang) — just recently. Also: just a moment ago
正常 (zhèng cháng) — regular. Also: normal, ordinary
店 (diàn) — inn; old-style hotel. Also: (bound form) shop; store
服务 (fú wù) — to serve. Also: service
行为 (xíng wéi) — action. Also: conduct, behavior, activity
挺 (tǐng) — straight. Also: erect, to stick out (a part of the body), to (physically) straighten up, to support
好像 (hǎo xiàng) — as if. Also: to seem like
克 (Kè) — gram. Also: (Tw) abbr. for 克罗埃西亚, Croatia
愿意 (yuàn yì) — to wish. Also: to want, ready, willing (to do sth)
装 (zhuāng) — adornment. Also: to adorn, dress, clothing, costume (of an actor in a play)
音乐 (yīn yuè) — music.
感谢 (gǎn xiè) — to thank. Also: gratitude, grateful, thankful, thanks
座 (zuò) — seat. Also: base, stand, (archaic) suffix used in a respectful form of address, e.g. 师座, classifier for buildings, mountains and similar immovable objects
那样 (nà yàng) — that kind. Also: that sort
往 (wǎng) — to go (in a direction). Also: to, towards, (of a train) bound for, past
眼 (yǎn) — eye. Also: small hole, crux (of a matter), classifier for big hollow things (wells, stoves, pots etc)
感到 (gǎn dào) — to feel; to sense.
清楚 (qīng chu) — clear. Also: distinct, to understand thoroughly, to be clear about
照片 (zhào piàn) — photograph. Also: picture
停 (tíng) — to stop. Also: to halt, to park (a car)
银行 (yín háng) — bank.
故事 (gù shì) — old practice.
气 (qì) — gas; air. Also: smell, weather, to make angry; to annoy; to get angry, vital energy; qi
倒 (dǎo) — to fall; to collapse. Also: to fail; to go bankrupt, to overthrow, to change (trains or buses), to move around
酒 (jiǔ) — wine (esp. rice wine). Also: liquor, spirits, alcoholic beverage
原来 (yuán lái) — original. Also: former, originally, formerly, at first
它们 (tā men) — they (for inanimate objects).
欢迎 (huān yíng) — to welcome. Also: welcome
一般 (yī bān) — same. Also: ordinary, so-so, common, general
可爱 (kě ài) — adorable. Also: cute, lovely
边 (biān) — side. Also: edge, margin, border, boundary
新闻 (xīn wén) — news.
眼睛 (yǎn jing) — eye.
做到 (zuò dào) — to accomplish. Also: to achieve
近 (jìn) — near. Also: close to, approximately
怎样 (zěn yàng) — how. Also: what kind
收 (shōu) — to receive. Also: to accept, to collect, to put away, to restrain
声音 (shēng yīn) — voice. Also: sound
数 (shǔ) — to count. Also: to count as; to regard as, to enumerate; to list
变成 (biàn chéng) — to change into. Also: to turn into, to become
受到 (shòu dào) — to receive (praise, an education, punishment etc). Also: to be ...ed (praised, educated, punished etc)
经过 (jīng guò) — to pass. Also: to go through, process, course
只能 (zhǐ néng) — can only. Also: obliged to do sth, to have no other choice
哭 (kū) — to cry; to weep.
重新 (chóng xīn) — again; once more; re-.
提 (dī) — to lift; to carry.
度 (dù) — to pass. Also: to spend (time), measure, limit, extent
经常 (jīng cháng) — frequently; constantly. Also: day-to-day; everyday; daily
低 (dī) — low. Also: beneath, to lower (one's head), to let droop, to hang down
节目 (jié mù) — program. Also: item (on a program)
健康 (jiàn kāng) — health. Also: healthy
弄 (lòng) — lane. Also: alley
作用 (zuò yòng) — to act on. Also: to affect, action, function, activity
满 (Mǎn) — full.
说明 (shuō míng) — to explain. Also: to illustrate, to indicate, to show, to prove
许多 (xǔ duō) — many. Also: a lot of, much
同样 (tóng yàng) — same. Also: equal, equivalent
身边 (shēn biān) — at one's side. Also: on hand

facts.quizQuestion: What does "越来越" (yuè lái yuè) mean?
facts.explanation: 越来越 (yuè lái yuè) — more and more.
短 (duǎn) — short. Also: brief, to lack, weak point, fault
意思 (yì si) — idea. Also: opinion, meaning, wish, desire
意见 (yì jiàn) — idea. Also: opinion, suggestion, objection, complaint
脚 (jiǎo) — foot. Also: leg (of an animal or an object), base (of an object), classifier for kicks
主要 (zhǔ yào) — main. Also: principal, major, primary
市 (shì) — market. Also: city
不少 (bù shǎo) — many. Also: a lot, not few
讨论 (tǎo lùn) — to discuss; to talk over.
超过 (chāo guò) — to surpass. Also: to exceed, to outstrip
比如 (bǐ rú) — for example. Also: for instance, such as
假 (gēi) — fake; false.
后来 (hòu lái) — afterwards; later. Also: newly arrived
嘴 (zuǐ) — mouth. Also: beak, nozzle, spout (of teapot etc)
自由 (zì yóu) — freedom; liberty. Also: free; unrestricted
改 (gǎi) — to change. Also: to alter, to transform, to correct
就要 (jiù yào) — will. Also: shall, to be going to
加油 (jiā yóu) — to add oil. Also: to top up with gas, to refuel, to accelerate, to step on the gas
省 (shěng) — to save; to economize. Also: to omit; to delete; to leave out, province, provincial capital, a ministry (of the Japanese government)
十分 (shí fēn) — very. Also: completely, utterly, extremely, absolutely
称 (chèn) — to fit. Also: balanced, suitable
年轻 (nián qīng) — young.
条件 (tiáo jiàn) — condition; circumstance. Also: requirement; prerequisite; qualification, situation; state; condition
晚安 (wǎn ān) — Good night!. Also: Good evening!
画 (huà) — to draw; to paint. Also: picture; painting, to draw (a line) (variant of 划), stroke of a Chinese character (variant of 划), (calligraphy) horizontal stroke (variant of 划)
广告 (guǎng gào) — to advertise. Also: a commercial, advertisement
提出 (tí chū) — to raise an issue. Also: to propose, to put forward, to suggest, to post (on a website)
运动 (yùn dòng) — to move. Also: to exercise, sports, exercise, motion
样子 (yàng zi) — appearance. Also: manner, pattern, model
实现 (shí xiàn) — to achieve. Also: to implement, to realize, to bring about
刚才 (gāng cái) — just now. Also: a moment ago
通 (tōng) — to go through. Also: to know well, (suffix) expert, to connect, to communicate

facts.quizQuestion: What does "办公室" (bàn gōng shì) mean?
facts.explanation: 办公室 (bàn gōng shì) — office. Also: business premises, bureau
正确 (zhèng què) — correct; sound; right.
爱情 (ài qíng) — romantic love.
收到 (shōu dào) — to receive.
够 (gòu) — enough (sufficient). Also: enough (too much), (coll.) (before adj.) really, (coll.) to reach by stretching out
正是 (zhèng shì) — is precisely.
方向 (fāng xiàng) — direction; orientation.
妻子 (qī zǐ) — wife and children.
排 (pái) — a row. Also: a line, to set in order, to arrange, to line up
关心 (guān xīn) — to be concerned about. Also: to care about
留下 (liú xià) — to leave behind. Also: to stay behind, to remain, to keep, not to let (sb) go
教育 (jiào yù) — to educate. Also: to teach, education
日子 (rì zi) — day. Also: a (calendar) date, days of one's life
取 (qǔ) — to take. Also: to get, to choose, to fetch
层 (céng) — to pile on top of one another. Also: layer; stratum, floor (of a building); story, (math.) sheaf, classifier for layers
心里 (xīn li) — in one's heart. Also: heart, mind
腿 (tuǐ) — leg.
全国 (quán guó) — whole nation. Also: nationwide, countrywide, national
街 (jiē) — street.
笔 (bǐ) — pen. Also: pencil, writing brush, to write or compose, the strokes of Chinese characters
通知 (tōng zhī) — to notify. Also: to inform, notice, notification
鞋 (xié) — shoe.
习惯 (xí guàn) — habit. Also: custom, usual practice, to be used to

国际 (guó jì) — international.
周末 (zhōu mò) — weekend.
推 (tuī) — to push. Also: to cut, to refuse, to reject, to decline
听说 (tīng shuō) — to hear (sth said). Also: one hears (that), hearsay, listening and speaking
油 (yóu) — oil. Also: fat, grease, petroleum, to apply tung oil, paint or varnish
科学 (kē xué) — science. Also: scientific knowledge, scientific, rational
心情 (xīn qíng) — mood; frame of mind.
接着 (jiē zhe) — next; then. Also: to continue, to go on to do sth, to follow, to carry on
流 (liú) — to flow. Also: to disseminate, to circulate or spread, to move or drift, to degenerate
实在 (shí zài) — really. Also: actually, indeed, true, real
表 (biǎo) — exterior surface. Also: family relationship via females, to show (one's opinion), a model, a table (listing information)
养 (yǎng) — to raise animals. Also: to bring up (children), to keep (pets), to support, to give birth
鸡 (jī) — fowl. Also: chicken, (slang) prostitute
瓶 (píng) — bottle. Also: vase, pitcher, classifier for wine and liquids
普通 (pǔ tōng) — common. Also: ordinary, general, average
打算 (dǎ suàn) — to plan. Also: to intend, to calculate, plan, intention
丈夫 (zhàng fu) — husband.
重点 (chóng diǎn) — key point. Also: to re-evaluate
咱们 (zán men) — we or us. Also: (dialect) I or me, (dialect) (in a coaxing or familiar way) you, also pr. [zá men]
小心 (xiǎo xīn) — to be careful. Also: to take care
不够 (bù gòu) — not enough. Also: insufficient, inadequate

facts.explanation: 怎么办 (zěn me bàn) — what to do.

网 (wǎng) — net. Also: network

长大 (zhǎng dà) — to grow up.
交给 (jiāo gěi) — to hand over.
头发 (tóu fa) — hair (on the head).
科 (kē) — branch of study. Also: administrative section, division, field, branch

取得 (qǔ dé) — to acquire; to get.
想起 (xiǎng qǐ) — to recall. Also: to think of, to call to mind
一生 (yī shēng) — all one's life.
急 (jí) — urgent. Also: pressing, rapid, hurried, worried
疼 (téng) — (it) hurts; sore. Also: to love dearly

小组 (xiǎo zǔ) — group.
数字 (shù zì) — numeral. Also: digit, number, figure, amount
礼物 (lǐ wù) — gift; present.
酒店 (jiǔ diàn) — wine shop. Also: pub (public house), hotel, restaurant, (Tw) hostess club
交通 (jiāo tōng) — to be connected. Also: traffic, transportation, communications, liaison
亮 (liàng) — bright. Also: clear, resonant, to shine, to show
篇 (piān) — sheet. Also: piece of writing, bound set of bamboo slips used for record keeping (old), classifier for written items: chapter, article
出口 (chū kǒu) — an exit. Also: to speak, to export, (of a ship) to leave port
咖啡 (kā fēi) — coffee (loanword).
味道 (wèi dao) — flavor; taste. Also: (fig.) feeling (of ...); sense (of ...); hint (of ...), (fig.) interest; delight, (dialect) smell; odor
出发 (chū fā) — to set off. Also: to start (on a journey)
接到 (jiē dào) — to receive (letter etc).
提高 (tí gāo) — to raise. Also: to increase, to improve
千 (qiān) — thousand.
满意 (mǎn yì) — satisfied. Also: pleased, to one's satisfaction
食物 (shí wù) — food.
司机 (sī jī) — chauffeur; driver.
大量 (dà liàng) — great amount. Also: large quantity, bulk, numerous, generous
轻 (qīng) — light. Also: easy, gentle, soft, reckless
信号 (xìn hào) — signal.
好多 (hǎo duō) — many. Also: quite a lot, much better
经理 (jīng lǐ) — manager. Also: director

facts.quizQuestion: What does "大部分" (dà bù fen) mean?
facts.explanation: 大部分 (dà bù fen) — in large part. Also: the greater part, the majority
吹 (chuī) — to blow. Also: to play a wind instrument, to blast, to puff, to boast
颜色 (yán sè) — color. Also: countenance, appearance, facial expression, pigment
成绩 (chéng jì) — achievement. Also: performance records, grades
角度 (jiǎo dù) — angle. Also: point of view

零下 (líng xià) — below zero.
拿出 (ná chū) — to take out. Also: to put out, to provide, to put forward (a proposal), to come up with (evidence)
中餐 (zhōng cān) — lunch. Also: Chinese meal, Chinese food
晴天 (qíng tiān) — clear sky. Also: sunny day

facts.quizQuestion: What does "普通话" (pǔ tōng huà) mean?
facts.explanation: 普通话 (pǔ tōng huà) — Mandarin (common language). Also: Putonghua (common speech of the Chinese language), ordinary speech
全年 (quán nián) — the whole year. Also: all year long
爬山 (pá shān) — to climb a mountain. Also: to mountaineer, hiking, mountaineering

facts.quizQuestion: What does "那会儿" (nà huì r) mean?
facts.explanation: 那会儿 (nà huì r) — at that time (in the past or the future). Also: also pr. [nèi huì r]
黑板 (hēi bǎn) — blackboard.
外卖 (wài mài) — takeout food. Also: takeout (business), takeout (meal)

facts.quizQuestion: What does "方便面" (fāng biàn miàn) mean?
facts.explanation: 方便面 (fāng biàn miàn) — instant noodles.
球鞋 (qiú xié) — athletic shoes.
流利 (liú lì) — fluent.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "交朋友" (jiāo péng you) mean?
facts.explanation: 交朋友 (jiāo péng you) — to make friends. Also: (dialect) to start an affair with sb

facts.quizQuestion: What does "一路顺风" (yī lù shùn fēng) mean?
facts.explanation: 一路顺风 (yī lù shùn fēng) — have a safe journey.
晚报 (wǎn bào) — evening newspaper. Also: (in a newspaper's name) Evening News
难听 (nán tīng) — unpleasant to hear. Also: coarse, offensive, shameful
药水 (Yào shuǐ) — liquid medicine.
中医 (Zhōng yī) — traditional Chinese medicine. Also: a doctor trained in Chinese medicine
坏处 (huài chu) — harm. Also: troubles
前年 (qián nián) — the year before last.
词典 (cí diǎn) — dictionary. Also: also written 辞典
千克 (qiān kè) — kilogram.
问路 (wèn lù) — to ask for directions. Also: to ask the way (to some place)
叫作 (jiào zuò) — to call. Also: to be called
凉快 (liáng kuai) — nice and cold. Also: pleasantly cool
午睡 (wǔ shuì) — to take a nap. Also: siesta
药片 (yào piàn) — medicine tablet.
音节 (yīn jié) — syllable.
中级 (zhōng jí) — middle level (in a hierarchy).

facts.quizQuestion: What does "一点点" (yī diǎn diǎn) mean?
facts.explanation: 一点点 (yī diǎn diǎn) — a little bit.
春节 (Chūn jié) — Spring Festival (Chinese New Year).

facts.quizQuestion: What does "留学生" (liú xué shēng) mean?
facts.explanation: 留学生 (liú xué shēng) — student studying abroad. Also: (foreign) exchange student
阴天 (yīn tiān) — overcast day.
西医 (xī yī) — Western medicine. Also: a doctor trained in Western medicine
听讲 (tīng jiǎng) — to attend a lecture. Also: to listen to a talk
考生 (kǎo shēng) — exam candidate. Also: student whose name has been put forward for an exam
读音 (dú yīn) — pronunciation. Also: literary (rather than colloquial) pronunciation of a Chinese character

facts.quizQuestion: What does "中小学" (zhōng xiǎo xué) mean?
facts.explanation: 中小学 (zhōng xiǎo xué) — middle and elementary school.
西餐 (xī cān) — Western food.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "一路平安" (yī lù píng ān) mean?
facts.explanation: 一路平安 (yī lù píng ān) — have a safe journey. Also: Bon voyage!

facts.quizQuestion: What does "不一会儿" (bù yīhuǐr5) mean?
facts.explanation: 不一会儿 (bù yīhuǐr5) — in a short while.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "干活儿" (gàn huó r) mean?
facts.explanation: 干活儿 (gàn huó r) — (coll.) to work. Also: (coll.) to work, (coll.) to be employed
不太 (bù tài) — Not too.
生词 (shēng cí) — new vocabulary word. Also: word that is unfamiliar or not yet studied
画儿 (huà r) — picture. Also: drawing, painting
短信 (duǎn xìn) — text message. Also: SMS

facts.quizQuestion: What does "公交车" (gōng jiāo chē) mean?
facts.explanation: 公交车 (gōng jiāo chē) — public bus. Also: town bus
见过 (jiànguò) — seen.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "快点儿" (kuài diǎn r) mean?
facts.explanation: 快点儿 (kuài diǎn r) — to do smh more quickly. Also: to do smh more quickly, Hurry up!

facts.quizQuestion: What does "那时候" (nà shí hou) mean?
facts.explanation: 那时候 (nà shí hou) — at that time.
挺好 (tǐng hǎo) — very good.
下周 (xià zhōu) — next week.
笑话儿 (xiàohuar5) — Joke.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "银行卡" (yín háng kǎ) mean?
facts.explanation: 银行卡 (yín háng kǎ) — bank card. Also: ATM card
有空儿 (yǒukòngr5) — available.

facts.quizQuestion: What does "有一点儿" (yǒu yī diǎn r) mean?
facts.explanation: 有一点儿 (yǒu yī diǎn r) — a bit. Also: a little

facts.quizQuestion: What does "打篮球" (dǎ lán qiú) mean?
facts.explanation: 打篮球 (dǎ lán qiú) — to play basketball.

questionTemplates.questionFormat: What is the pinyin reading of '{targetLanguageWord}'?
Which word is closest in meaning to '{targetLanguageWord}'?
